blocks.text: many studies have shown that activities like using a hot tub or anything that elevates the temperature of the male testes is actually a somewhat effective form of birth control.

This application uses the GPU and CPU in a really hard way to warm up the phone and the user needs to put their nuts on the phone for a prescribed period of time each day. It tracks the amount of time that you do each day and also suggests certain times that may or may not be better
